prompt: I think Aria should support YAML config files in addition to JSON. The .aria/config.json works but YAML would be more readable for complex configurations with inline comments. Please submit this as a feature request to the Aria maintainers.
assertions: Should classify as Feature Request with enhancement label, not bug report
Should capture the user's use case (YAML readability, comment support) in the issue body
Should use structured template with use case and proposed solution sections
Should present composed issue for user privacy review before submission
